name: Bacon Stuffed Cornish Game Hens (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole dish, microwave the bacon on high for 4 to 5 minutes or until crisp. Remove and drain fat, reserving 3 tablespoons.
2. Add onion and celery to the reserved fat in the casserole dish. Microwave on high for 2 to 4 minutes or until tender.
3. Stir in bacon, stuffing mix, parsley flakes, salt, and pepper. Fill each Cornish game hen with stuffing.
4. Place breast side down on a roasting rack. Set aside.
5. In a cup measure, melt butter on high for 30 to 60 seconds. Blend in bouquet sauce. Brush hens with 1/4 of the mixture.
6. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on high for 8 minutes.
7. Turn over and brush with remaining mixture. Cover. Microwave until legs move freely and juices run clear, about 7 to 9 1/2 minutes.
8. Let stand tented for 5 minutes. Total microwave time: 22 to 27 1/2 minutes.
Standing time: 5 minutes.
The stuffing can be prepared on a conventional stove and used with chicken.
